Competitors: LinkedIn Recruiter (Professional-network search and recruiting platform competing directly with Connectifier’s social search and talent discovery capabilities.); Entelo (Recruiting software that uses data aggregation and machine learning to help employers discover and source candidates.); HiringSolved (Candidate-sourcing platform focused on aggregating and searching recruiting data across online sources.); TalentBin (Social recruiting platform that helps recruiters identify and engage passive candidates from online networks.); Gild (Talent intelligence and recruiting platform using data-driven candidate search and assessment for technical hiring.)
